Name: MAGIC_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the configuraiton of magic spells.

Fields.Name: Dialog Message ID
Fields.Description: The text ID of to use for the 'Yes / No' dialog issued when this spell is used.

Fields.Name: Ignore Usage Restriction SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: If the specified SpEffect is active on the player, then usage restrictions for this spell are ignored.

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: The numeric ID used for ordering each spell in menus.

Fields.Name: Call ID
Fields.Description: The call ID to used to specific the Attack, Bullet or SpEffect this spell uses when triggered.

Fields.Name: MP Consumption
Fields.Description: The MP consumption of this spell when triggered.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption
Fields.Description: The stamina consumption of this spell when triggered.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The numeric ID used for specifying which icon is used to display this spell in menus.

Fields.Name: Behavior ID
Fields.Description: The behavior parameter to use when this spell is triggered.

Fields.Name: Item Requirement for Purchase
Fields.Description: The item (or items) that the spell costs in a shop that must be present before it can be purchased.

Fields.Name: State Info Switch: Magic ID
Fields.Description: The new magic row ID to use when the specified state info is invoked.

Fields.Name: Usage Count
Fields.Description: The number of uses this spell allows when equipped before requiring a bonfire reset.

Fields.Name: Humanity Consumption
Fields.Description: The amount of humanity this spell consumes when triggered.

Fields.Name: Maximum Dexterity
Fields.Description: The maximum value of dexterity over start value.

Fields.Name: Particle Variation ID
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the SFX ID invoked in the TAE event.

Fields.Name: Slot Usage
Fields.Description: The number of spell equipment slots this spell occupies.

Fields.Name: Requirement: INT
Fields.Description: The minimum amount of intelligence (INT) this spell requires for a valid cast.

Fields.Name: Requirement: FTH
Fields.Description: The minimum amount of faith (FTH) this spell requires for a valid cast.

Fields.Name: Casting Speed Range: Start
Fields.Description: The minimum value of dexterity (DEX) to start scaling the cast animation with (via the TimeAct event).

Fields.Name: Casting Speed Range: End
Fields.Description: The maximum value of dexterity (DEX) to stop scaling the cast animation with (via the TimeAct event).

Fields.Name: Magic School Type
Fields.Description: The magic school this spell belongs to.

Fields.Name: Call ID Type
Fields.Description: The parameter type to use for the call ID.

Fields.Name: SpEffect Category
Fields.Description: The SpEffect category this spell belongs to

Fields.Name: Motion Category
Fields.Description: The TimeAct offset used in the c0000 TAE to find the casting animations.

Fields.Name: Menu Type on Usage
Fields.Description: The type of menu to display when the spell is used.

Fields.Name: State Info Switch: Value
Fields.Description: The state info value that triggers the state info switch for this spell, changing the magic row ID it uses.

Fields.Name: State Info Switch: Replacement Category
Fields.Description: Additional conditions when switching the spell due to a state info switch occuring.

Fields.Name: Usage Limit: SpEffect Category
Fields.Description: The usage categories that this spell will be blocked by if SpEffect with the same category are present.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: None
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used while in no covenant.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: Way of White
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used while in Way of White covenant.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: Princess Guard
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used while in Princess Guard covenant.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: Warrior of Sunlight
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used while in Warrior of Sunlight covenant.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: Darkwraith
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used while in Darkwraith covenant.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: Path of the Dragon
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used while in Path of the Dragon covenant.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: Gravelord Servant
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used while in Gravelord Servant covenant.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: Forest Hunter
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used while in Forest Hunter covenant.

Fields.Name: Usable in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: If ON, then the spell can be used in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Usable in Multiplayer Only
Fields.Description: If ON, then the spell can be used in multiplayer sessions, but not in offline sessions.

Fields.Name: Is Weapon Enchantment
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell is considered a weapon enhancement spell.

Fields.Name: Is Shield Enchantment
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell is considered a shield enhancement spell.

Fields.Name: Enable in Multiplayer: Host
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used in a sessions where the player is the host.

Fields.Name: Enable in Multiplayer: Gray Phantom
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used in a sessions where the player is a gray phantom.

Fields.Name: Enable in Multiplayer: White Phantom
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used in a sessions where the player is a white phantom.

Fields.Name: Enable in Multiplayer: Black Phantom
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used in a sessions where the player is a black phantom.

Fields.Name: Disable when Offline
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell is disabled if the player is not in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Trigger Resonance
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell will broadcast resonance across multiplayer sessions (i.e. white rings) that empower the spell.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: Blade of the Dark Moon
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used while in Blade of the Dark Moon covenant.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: Chaos Servant
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell can be used while in Chaos Servant covenant.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: 10
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell is associated with the covenant in slot 10.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: 11
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell is associated with the covenant in slot 11.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: 12
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell is associated with the covenant in slot 12.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: 13
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell is associated with the covenant in slot 13.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: 14
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell is associated with the covenant in slot 14.

Fields.Name: Vow Type: 15
Fields.Description: If ON, this spell is associated with the covenant in slot 15.
